text:
miwi        2008-10-12 09:58:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio/snd            Makefile pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Adds OPTIONS for the following scheme implementations:
          *Gauche
          *S7 (which according to the documentation,
                is now the default instead of Guile)
  - Fix plist
  - Bump PORTREVISION
  
  PR:             127761
  Submitted by:   Timothy Beyer <beyert@cs.ucr.edu>
  Approved by:    maintainer
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.66      +36 -2     ports/audio/snd/Makefile

  1.4       +134 -134  ports/audio/snd/pkg-plist
